DataCalcInsightTemplate.description: The average length of a customer's relationship with the company/brand
DataCalcInsightTemplate.expression: SELECT UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c as unifiedindividualid__c, MIN(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__OrderStartDate__c) as First_Order_Date__c, (MONTHS_BETWEEN(CURRENT_DATE(), MIN(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__OrderStartDate__c)),0) as Customer_Since_Months__c FROM UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm JOIN UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm ON UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c = UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c JOIN ssot__SalesOrder__dlm ON UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__SoldToCustomerId__c GROUP BY unifiedindividualid__c
